indications.text:
EXTRANEAL (icodextrin) is indicated for a single daily exchange for the long (8- to 16- hour) dwell during
continuous ambulatory peritoneal dialysis (CAPD) or automated peritoneal dialysis (APD) for the management of
kidney failure in patients requiring long-term kidney replacement therapy. EXTRANEA...

EXTRANEAL is indicated for a single daily exchange for the long (8- to 16- hour) dwell during
continuous ambulatory peritoneal dialysis (CAPD) or automated peritoneal dialysis (APD) for the
management of chronic renal failure.(See CLINICAL PHARMACOLOGY, Clinical Studies)
